message:
🐛 Deduplicate and filter placeholder content from resolution extraction (#617)

- Filter out placeholder commands like <command>, ${variable}, your-token
- Deduplicate steps and code blocks to prevent repeated content
- Skip separator lines (---) from being captured as steps
- Normalize text for better duplicate detection

This fixes saved resolutions capturing conversation fragments and
duplicate commands instead of actual remediation steps.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
